Sutaria Infotech Privacy Policy

At Sutaria Infotech, our users' privacy is important. We are committed to protecting your personal information and ensuring transparency in how we handle your data.

This Privacy Policy applies to our mobile applications and website (collectively, the “Service”).

If you have any questions, contact us at: sutariainfotech@gmail.com

Summary of Policy

  • We do not require personal data to use our apps
  • We may collect usage data for analytics
  • Third-party services may collect data for ads
  • We do not sell your personal data

Information We Collect

  • Device information (OS, model)
  • Usage data (features used)
  • Analytics data

Use of Information

  • Improve app performance
  • Provide better user experience
  • Analyze usage trends

Third-Party Services

We may use third-party tools like:

  • Google Firebase (Analytics, Crashlytics)
  • Google AdMob (Advertising)

These services may collect information as per their own privacy policies.

Advertising

We may display ads using third-party services. These providers may collect device data for personalized ads.

Data Sharing

We do not sell or rent your data. Data may be shared only:

  • With analytics providers
  • To comply with legal obligations

Security

We implement industry-standard security measures, but no system is 100% secure.

User Choices

  • You can uninstall the app anytime
  • You can disable ads tracking from device settings

Children's Privacy

Our services are not intended for children under 16.

Changes to Policy

We may update this policy periodically. Updates will be posted on this page.

Contact Us

Email: sutariainfotech@gmail.com

Sutaria Infotech © 2026 • All Rights Reserved
